CreateDictionaries.uploadHintLargeFile: Supports large file upload (supports file type txt)
CreateDictionaries.incorrectFormat: {name} is not a txt or csv file, please upload the correct format!
CreateDictionaries.storageMethod: Choose a storage method as needed, which does not affect usage:
CreateDictionaries.fileStorage: File Storage: Save the dictionary as a file locally, does not support hit count, faster upload speed.
CreateDictionaries.databaseStorage: Database Storage: Read the dictionary data and save it in the database, supports hit count, more convenient to search.
CreateDictionaries.largeFileStorageMethod: Large File Storage: When the uploaded file is larger than 20M, it supports large file storage, only supports txt, more convenient storage.
CreateDictionaries.uploadHint: Drag and drop files here, or click to import
CreateDictionaries.uploadHintFolder: Supports batch upload of folders (supports file types txt/csv)
CreateDictionaries.largeFileOnlyTxt: Large file storage only supports txt file type

ReadOnlyNewPayload.pleaseSelectDictionaryOrFolder: Please select the payload or folder to insert

NewPayloadLocalList.selectDictionaryToInsert: Select the payload you want to insert
NewPayloadLocalList.deleteDictionaryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this payload?
NewPayloadLocalList.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its payloads?
NewPayloadLocalList.batchExportConfirm: Are you sure you want to batch export selected payloads?
NewPayloadLocalList.exitEditConfirm: Are you sure you want to exit editing?

DeleteConfirm.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete?
DeleteConfirm.deleteConfirmContent: It will be permanently deleted after confirmation.

FileComponent.toDatabaseWaiting: Converting to database storage, please wait...

PayloadLocalContent.fuzzModuleRenderHint: Can be rendered via the fuzz module {{x(payload_name)}}

NewPayload.migrateDataContent: Due to the reconstruction of the Payload function, you need to click OK to migrate the old data. Migrating data will not cause any data loss.
NewPayload.engineVersionTooLowContent: The current engine version is too low to use the new Payload. Please update the engine to v1.2.9-sp3 or above.
NewPayload.selectDictionaryHint: Please click the list on the left to select the dictionary you want to view

NewPayloadTable.addHitCountFieldNotice: Added Hit Count field. The higher the hit count, the higher its priority during brute-forcing.
